title: Mundhinam Parthene Song Lyrics Vaaranam Aayiram
stanzas: <div>Mundhinam Parthene Song Lyrics Vaaranam Aayiram

Mundhinam paarthene
paarthadhum thotreney
salladai kannaaga
nenjamum pun aanadhe

iththanai naalaaga
unnai naan paaraamal
engu naan poneno
naatkalum veen aanadhe

vaanathil nee vennilaa
yaekkathil naan theivathaa

ippodhe ennodu vanthaal enna
oor paarka ondraaga
sendraal enna (2)

Mundhinam paarthene
paarthadhum thotreney
salladai kannaaga
nenjamum pun aanadhe

iththanai naalaaga
unnai naan paaraamal
engu naan poneno
naatkalum veen aanadhe

thulaa thattil unnai vaithu
nigar seiyya ponnai vaithaai
thulavaram thorkkaatho
paerazhage

mugam paarthu pesum unnai
mudhal kadhal sindhum kannai
anaikkaamal poveno aaruyire

oh nizhal pola vidaamal unnai
thodarvenadi
pugai pola padaamal pattu
nagarvenadi

vinaa nooru kanavu nooru
vidai solladi..

Mundhinam paarthene
paarthadhum thotreney
salladai kannaaga
ullamum pun aanadhe

iththanai naalaaga
(oh my love)
unnai naan paaraamal
(yes my love)
engu naan poneno
naatkalum veen aanadhe

Kadal neelam mangum neram
alai vandhu theendum thooram
manam sendru pogaatho eerathile

thalai saaikka tholum thandhaai
viral korthu pakkam vandhaai
idhazh mattum innum yen
dhoorathile.

pagal neram kanaakkal kanden
urangaamale
uyir rendum uraiya kanden
nerungaamale

unai andri enakku yaedhu
edhirkaalame

Mundhinam paarthene
paarthadhum thotreney
salladai kannaaga
nenjamum pun aanadhe

iththanai naalaaga
unnai naan paaraamal
engu naan poneno
naatkalum veen aanadhe

vaanathil nee vennilaa
yaekkathil naan theivathaa

ippodhe ennodu vanthaal enna
oor paarka ondraaga
sendraal enna (2)

vennilaaa
***************
nenjukkul peidhidum maa mazhai
neerukul moozhgidum thaamarai
sattendru maarudhu vaanilai
penne un mel pizhai

nillamal veesidum paeralai
nenjukkul neenthidum thaaragai
pon vannam soodiya kaarigai
penne nee kaanchanai

oh shaanthi shaanti oh shaanthi
yen uyirai uyirai neeyenthi
yen sendraai sendraai ennai thaandi
ini neethan enthan andhaathi

nenjukkul peidhidum maa mazhai
neerukul moozhgidum thaamarai
sattendru maarudhu vaanilai
penne un mel pizhai

yedho ondru ennai eerkka
mookin nuni marmam saerkka
kallathanam yethum illaa
punnagaiyo bogan villaa

nee nindra idam endraal
vilai yeri pogaadho
nee sellum vazhiellam
panikatti aahadho

ennodu vaa veedu varaikkum
en veettai paar ennai pidikkum

ival yaaro yaaro theriyaadhe
ival pinnal nenje pogaadhe
idhu pyyo meiyyo theriyaadhe
ival pinnal nenje pogaadhe

nenjukkul peidhidum maa mazhai
neerukul moozhgidum thaamarai
sattendru maarudhu vaanilai
penne un mel pizhai

thookangalai thooki sendraai
yaekkangalai thoovi sendraai
unnai thaandi pogum podhu
veesum kaattrin veechu veru

nil endru nee sonnal
en kaalam nagaradhe
nee soodum poovellam
oru podhum udhiradhe

kadhal enai ketkka villai
Kettaal adhu kadhal illai

en jeevan jeevan neethane
ena thondrum neram idhuthane
nee illai illai endrale
en nenjam nenjam thaangadhe

nenjukkul peidhidum maa mazhai
neerukul moozhgidum thaamarai
sattendru maarudhu vaanilai
penne un mel pizhai

nillamal veesidum peralai
nenjukkul neenthidum tharagai
pon vannam soodiya kaarigai
penne nee kaanchanai

oh shaanthi shaanti oh shaanthi
yen uyirai uyirai neeyenthi

ini neethan yenthan andhaathi

seo.title: Mundhinam Parthene Song Lyrics Vaaranam Aayiram
seo.description: Full Mundhinam Parthene songs lyrics, Vaaranam Aayiram Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Harrish Jeyaraj, Singer(s): Naresh Iyer, Prashanthini.
seo.keywords: Vaaranam Aayiram, Harrish Jeyaraj, Naresh Iyer, Prashanthini, Mundhinam Parthene full lyrics, Vaaranam Aayiram songs lyrics, Mundhinam Parthene lyrics snippets, Mundhinam Parthene WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mundhinam Parthene lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mundhinam Parthene?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on the emotions tied to a romantic relationship.

How does this song fit into the plot of Vaaranam Aayiram?

In Vaaranam Aayiram, the song encapsulates the protagonist's feelings of love and nostalgia, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of Mundhinam Parthene?

The song features the melodious voices of Naresh Iyer and Prashanthini.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mundhinam Parthene was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his captivating melodies.

When was the song released?

Mundhinam Parthene was released on September 24, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mundhinam Parthene, the protagonist reflects on his love and the bittersweet memories associated with it. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the characters navigate their emotions, the song beautifully captures the essence of love's complexities. This enchanting duet leaves listeners with a lingering sense of warmth and affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mundhinam Parthene from Vaaranam Aayiram is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Naresh Iyer and Prashanthini's enchanting vocals, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. The soothing melodies crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj make it a timeless classic that resonates with every romantic heart.
stanzaMeanings: I see ahead, and what I see is like a flower blooming in my heart.
For so many days, I haven't seen you; where have I gone in those days?
In the sky, you are the moon; in the universe, I am the god.
Now that you have come to me, if you look at my town, what will happen?
I see ahead, and what I see is like a flower blooming in my heart.
For so many days, I haven't seen you; where have I gone in those days?
In the balance of life, you are the one who holds the weight; don't let the name fade away.
Looking at your face, if I speak, will my first love go away without hearing?
Oh, without leaving like a shadow, I will continue; like a song, I will sing.
Without a sound, a hundred dreams are waiting to be told.
I see ahead, and what I see is like a flower blooming in my heart.
For so many days, (oh my love) I haven't seen you (yes my love); where have I gone in those days?
The ocean's blue waves come and go, but the heart doesn't leave; it stays in the depths.
You came to me, and you brought the distance with you; why is it still far away?
In the daytime, I saw dreams without sleeping; both lives spoke without resting.
Without you, I have nothing to face.
I see ahead, and what I see is like a flower blooming in my heart.
For so many days, I haven't seen you; where have I gone in those days?
In the sky, you are the moon; in the universe, I am the god.
Now that you have come to me, if you look at my town, what will happen?
In the heart, the rain falls like a heavy downpour; it will not stop, and the sky will change.
Without stopping, the wind blows, and the stars in the heart shine; you are the one who brings light.
Oh peace, peace, oh peace, you are my life; you have crossed over, and now you are my song.
In the heart, the rain falls like a heavy downpour; it will not stop, and the sky will change.
Something is pulling me; the secret of the heart is hidden; there is no smile, no joy.
If you stand in one place, will the price rise? Is the path you take a burden?
Until you come to my home, look at my house; it will hold me.
Who is she? Don't know; my heart is not going behind her; is this true? My heart is not going behind her.
In the heart, the rain falls like a heavy downpour; it will not stop, and the sky will change.
You have lifted the burdens; you have thrown away the worries; when you go, the wind will blow differently.
If you say 'stay,' my time will not pass; every flower you touch will bloom.
Love does not listen to me; if it does, then it is not love.
My life is you; when you are not there, my heart cannot bear it.
In the heart, the rain falls like a heavy downpour; it will not stop, and the sky will change.
Without stopping, the wind blows, and the stars in the heart shine; you are the one who brings light.
Oh peace, peace, oh peace, you are my life; you have crossed over, and now you are my song.
